message:
feat(widgets): improve paragraph wrapping and table column handling

Paragraph improvements:
- Refine word-wrapping algorithm for better line breaks
- Improve handling of long unbreakable strings

Table improvements:
- Add proportional column width distribution
- Improve header rendering with alignment support
- Add row highlight customization
- Fix edge cases with empty cells

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
